_comment: Canonical production configuration for the separated-growth-island benchmark (paper Sec. 5.2). These are the defaults in multi_island.py (DEFAULTS); the production run is reproduced with run_multi_island.sb (one seed per SLURM array task) followed by merge_multi_island.py. The reconstruction bandwidth K affects only the field figures; the per-island mass error E_m is reconstruction-free.
centers: 4x4 cell-centered grid on [-pi,pi]^2 (make_grid_centers), kept off the periodic seam
B_m: half-height disks {exp(-d_T(x,c_m)^2/(2 sigma^2)) >= eta}, asserted disjoint before running
reference: Fourier Strang split-step on a 512^2 grid (island masses converged to 0.2% vs 1024^2)
